summary: Executed e2e test scripts for forge-testing-optimization feature. All 7 CLI tests passed. Fixed justfile test-e2e --feature command to use feature-level playwright.config.ts when available. Generated results/latest.md report.
keyDecisions: Fixed justfile test-e2e --feature to detect and use feature-level playwright.config.ts (fixes testIgnore conflict where root config has testIgnore: /features//)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: All tests pass (status = PASS in latest.md)

notes: Coverage set to -1.0 as this is an e2e test execution task, not a unit test task. The justfile fix was necessary because root playwright.config.ts has testIgnore: /features// which prevented feature tests from being discovered.
